rationale: In the citing paper, Mukhopadhyay and Yeung (2010) appears as a single parenthetical reference when the authors note that parents can have future-focused motivations to promote healthy habits in children. The citing paper does not build its hypotheses on that article's lay-theory-of-self-control framework, does not reuse its measures or methods, and does not engage it in results interpretation. So this citation functions as background support rather than a meaningful conceptual or empirical foundation.
